description.ko: 갈라진 토양 단면이 퇴적물과 돌, 시간이 새긴 촉각적 지도로 드러난다.
description.en: A split soil monolith becomes a tactile atlas of sediment, stone, and time.

prompt: TERRA-1, titled "The Pedon Atlas." A close oblique study of a freshly split soil monolith, its vertical face reading like a raised topographic map made from compacted earth. Bands of #8B4513 dark umber subsoil, #D2691E iron-rich clay, and #F4A460 windblown silt bend around embedded pebbles, root hollows, fossil raindrop pits, and thin shale flakes. Matte #2F4F4F slate dust settles in shallow contour grooves and pressure seams, giving the surface a grounded, slow-weathered weight. Emphasize rough rock grains, friable loam, stacked sediment horizons, erosion notches, small gravel inclusions, and tactile relief under low grazing daylight; quiet earth tones, dense geological detail, no horizon, no sky, the land shown as a time-carved archive.
